Targets were prepared by drying pure (1/400 Pu-239)
Am-241 nitrate (about 900 ug Am-241 in 6 cm2 area)
on a 5.16 mg/cm2 Al foil, placed on a 0.3 mm thick
plastic frame, and with another Al foil used as a
catcher. Irradiation times were between 2 and 60 hr.
